title: Regions Unexplored
description: A stack of new biomes spread across the Overworld and Nether!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tkikq67H/images/c3039407d11bef3f847c67d454c8bb5011e79953.png)

**Regions Unexplored** is a biome mod that overhauls the generation of the overworld and nether in many ways. With 64 new biomes and a plethora of new blocks and items, there's plenty of unique regions out there waiting for you to explore them!

The mod currently lacks a wiki or full up-to-date biome list, but you can ask questions about the mod and hear about the latest updates in my [discord](https://discord.gg/pA9EqZRJzn).

## Dependencies

If you are on **0.6 or above**:
- Lithostitched 1.7.9 or above
- Fabric API (Fabric only)

If you are on **0.5.9 or below**:
- Terrablender
- Forge Config API Port (Fabric only)
- Fabric API (Fabric only)
